name: Replit Agent
what_it_is: Browser IDE agent with planning, checkpoints, deploys, and usage billing.
misses: research is not the first-class build root
checkpoint cost can reflect effort without proving value
exploit: connect every checkpoint to proof and learning

name: Bolt.new
what_it_is: Prompt/run/edit/deploy browser app builder using WebContainers.
misses: proof and deploy readiness are not the core differentiator

name: v0
what_it_is: Natural-language app/UI builder integrated with Vercel deployment.
exploit: research-backed prompt objects and recipe proof

name: Lovable
what_it_is: Full-stack natural-language app platform with code, deployment, backend, auth, database, and integrations.
misses: production readiness can still require external proof discipline
avoid: confusing generated app with production-proven app
exploit: proof-first launch path and learning capture

name: Claude Code
what_it_is: Coding agent with hooks, statusline, subagent/task event lifecycle.
misses: technical surface can be too terminal-centric for Studio operators
avoid: burying operator control in config files
exploit: turn agent events into Studio Run Control UX

name: OpenAI Codex cloud
what_it_is: Cloud coding agent in sandboxed repo tasks with PR handoff.
misses: cloud environment can hide setup assumptions
exploit: capability truth plus local/cloud lane choice

name: GitHub Copilot coding agent
what_it_is: GitHub-native coding agent that can be assigned work and create PRs.
exploit: PR proof packet and review checklist

name: Cursor Background Agents
what_it_is: Asynchronous remote coding agents that work on branches.

name: Windsurf Cascade
what_it_is: IDE agent with code/chat modes, planning, todos, checkpoints, workflows, deploys.
misses: deploy from agent can bypass product approval if unmanaged
exploit: approval center and deploy proof gates
